positive: A stylized and detailed representation of a glowing, mystical forest animal, perhaps a fox or a celestial wolf, rendered in a clean, monochrome silhouette style with striking neon bioluminescent accents. The animal is positioned centrally, leaping or in a powerful stance against a deep, starry night sky filled with abstract constellations and swirling nebula patterns. Utilize strong, contrasting colors like electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and deep indigo against a pitch-black background. The style should be intricate vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on fabric. Full body view, perfect symmetry, dynamic composition, cosmic fantasy theme.
negative: blur, noise, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, messy, grunge, amateur, bokeh, photorealism
